steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
The mixture equation is $$0.12x + 0.22y = 0.21(x+y)$$

Substitute the given value $x = 40$:
$$0.12(40) + 0.22y = 0.21(40 + y)$$
$$4.8 + 0.22y = 8.4 + 0.21y$$

steps.title: Solve for y
steps.content:
Subtract $0.21y$ from both sides:
$$4.8 + 0.01y = 8.4$$

Subtract 4.8 from both sides:
$$0.01y = 3.6$$

Divide by $0.01$:
$$y = 360$$

The answer is 360.
